message:
test(core): property-based tests for tantivy search pipeline invariants (wa-4t7x)

22 proptest properties verifying search pipeline structural invariants:
- Result count bounds, filter satisfaction, score monotonicity
- Pagination completeness (no duplicates), redaction opacity
- count()/search() consistency, get_by_event_id/log_offset roundtrip
- Filter commutativity, document identity preservation, serde roundtrip

Also fixes workflows.rs Instant import (std→tokio) broken by wa-1yz79.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
